text:
[residual] 14 far-field categories swept (light); 9 surfaced in-scope implement constraints (2 HIGH: edge-triggered firing + shed-effectiveness gap; 4 MED: fail-open-degraded, computePostCost reuse, jsonl try/catch, edge-latch; 3 LOW), 5 clean. All fold into the implement node; no new far-field domain opened.
[residual] future summarizer-spawn carrying auth material (not present here).
[residual] driver-spawned summarizer ignoring SKILL discipline could read/act beyond scope (doc-enforced).
[residual] report could under-represent decision trail (fidelity → observability).
[residual] none — read-only, no new writer/counter/migration; disk lossless (ac-2/ac-4).
[residual] LOW: ==threshold undefined; implement with >= and add a boundary test.
[residual] none — single-writer O_APPEND + in-process sequential reads; no torn-read path (ADR-20260628).
[residual] report directive triggers a fresh subagent spawn (host cost side-effect) the loop code doesn't account for.
[residual] MED: reads must fail-open with a DISTINCT degraded/unknown state (not 0) so a read failure never reads as low pressure; gate any narrative-shed on a non-empty assembler result.
[residual] HIGH→mitigated by edge-triggered firing (fire on threshold-crossing via report-artifact existence per band, not every round; ac-2-safe, no decisions.jsonl write). Folded into implement node.
[residual] unbounded decisions.jsonl growth is self-inflicted (→ resource-exhaustion).
[residual] none — additive-optional fields, undefined on the sub-threshold path (lsp_advisory? precedent); byte-identical below threshold.
[residual] LOW: fence the assembled free-text as untrusted data in the summarizer prompt (no code/command sink; bounded).
[residual] none — github redaction seam untouched; loop output already carries raw reasons, no new external surface.
[residual] prior task's personal data in a decision reason could re-surface (emission-widening swept under secret-exposure).
[residual] none material — no regulated data collected/processed/transmitted.
[residual] none — keep the report directive on loop OUTPUT; never append it to decisions.jsonl (would hit github-progress + force a schema change, out_of_scope).
[residual] HIGH→mitigated: monotonic re-fire solved by edge-trigger; shed-effectiveness (shed-happened-or-not) gap is inherent to the advisory (B) design the user chose — document as known residual in SKILL.
[residual] SKILL.md and code could land out of step if committed separately.
[residual] MED: extract a computePostCost helper WITHIN autopilot-loop.ts (proxy + collectRetroContext share it; doctor copy stays, follow-up); reuse retro-measure projection for the assembler; postCost=churn → weight count-based proxies primarily.
[residual] MED: wrap the decisions.jsonl read in try/catch fail-open (collectRetroContext pattern) so a truncated line never throws the pressure path.
[residual] LOW: bare source constant is the correct minimal choice (no runtime-input surface); cross-graph-size calibration + config exposure deferred to follow-up (ac-5 fail-open).
[residual] a future timestamp-ordering extension would introduce clock concerns; none here.
[residual] MED: edge-trigger via disk-derivable latch (report-artifact existence, ac-2-safe); prefer RecordResultOutcome as the primary emission surface (avoid redundant double-emit).
[close_reason] No auth path — loop reads local .ditto disk artifacts, emits in-process signals; no credential/session/login surface.
[close_reason] Additive directive/signal only; no permission logic. Scope preservation is SKILL-level doc discipline, not code here.
[close_reason] decisions.jsonl read-only as a data source; no writer/mutation added — append integrity untouched (ADR-20260628).
[close_reason] No env/deploy/3rd-party; emits in-process flag/directive. Any spawn is driver/host-mediated, reuses existing per-round spawn capability.
[close_reason] Internal loop, no external actor/request/replay surface.
[close_reason] Code-over-code-
…[truncated]
